## Checklist

- [ ] Code change covered by tests under `tests/Heimdall.UnitTests` or
      `tests/Heimdall.IntegrationTests`.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (or `skip-changelog` label
      applied with justification below).
- [ ] `dotnet cake --target=Test --configuration=Release` passes locally.
- [ ] `.editorconfig` style respected (tabs, 130-char lines, file-scoped
      namespaces, no new warnings).
- [ ] No changes under `.github/workflows/*` *or* PR title is prefixed `[ci]`.
